hooks.prompt: The user is about to run a git commit. Check whether CLAUDE.md needs to be updated to reflect the staged changes. Steps: 1) Read the current CLAUDE.md. 2) Run 'git diff --cached --name-only' to see which files are staged for commit. 3) If any staged changes affect architecture, commands, dependencies, or conventions documented in CLAUDE.md, respond with exactly this JSON: {"continue": false, "stopReason": "CLAUDE.md needs to be updated to reflect the staged changes. Please update CLAUDE.md before committing."} 4) If CLAUDE.md is already up to date, respond with exactly: {"continue": true}
